untranslatable_reason: The Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom pattern requires explicit trend line identification and slope calculation (comparing higher-left to lower-right trend lines), throwback detection to a sloping trend line, and lead-in phase height measurement. These geometric pattern features cannot be expressed using the available point-in-time price and technical indicators. The pattern requires multi-point historical trend line construction and slope analysis which is not supported by the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted a simplified proxy using close > prev_close (breakout direction UP), narrow range detection via range < atr_14 (lead-in phase), and exit on close below sma_20 (reversal confirmation). However, this does not capture the core pattern mechanics: downward-sloping trend lines, the bump phase, throwback behavior, or trend line validation. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern recognition function that can identify and measure trend lines across multiple bars.
